历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including old science track) were approximately 13295, 15259, 12940, 32209, and 21114 respectively. In 2024, due to Jiangxi Province's first new college entrance examination reform, the grouping of majors caused the minimum ranking to drop significantly to 32209; in 2025, it rebounded to 21114, indicating that under the new exam model, the admission ranking for this university's Physics Category tends to stabilize around 21000. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi: 93 in 2021, 94 in 2022, 93 in 2023, 89 in 2024, 95 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 99, an increase of 4 students (about 4.2%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (East China) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 73rd, fluctuating between 60 and 73 in recent years, overall stable, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. The university has no significant records in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal application files in recent years, with a stable reputation and no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal application heat signals. It is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with high industry recognition for core majors such as petroleum engineering and chemical engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like petroleum engineering and energy and power engineering have a recommended social popularity, while chemical engineering is in a differentiated wait-and-see state. In 2026, Jiangxi Province has about 267,800 Physics Category examinees, a slight increase of about 0.5% compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, with an enrollment share of about 3.3% (2025) in Jiangxi, making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 21114, a 4.2% enrollment expansion in 2026, a slight increase in local examinees, and a slight decline in university ranking, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be around 21697, with a fluctuation range of 21197–22197. The enrollment expansion is the main driver for the ranking to move back, with the increase in examinee numbers and slight drop in university ranking playing auxiliary roles.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 21000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
